status: ACTIVE: Phase 0 infrastructure plus research evidence packet implemented for local code-agent traces; empirical corpus gate still requires real measurement, split metadata, integrity checks, baseline rows, and >=200 labeled decision points before stable API promotion.

metricClaims.phase_0_infrastructure: implemented for local code-agent traces; synthetic tests cover Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Kimi Code, and Pi/PiGraph-shaped inputs.
metricClaims.research_packet: BeliefDecisionResearchEvidencePacket separates selective claim support from counterfactual claim support; OPE is required only for counterfactual claims.
metricClaims.local_smoke: 33 local sessions joined to 33 RunRecords and emitted 13137 decision rows across Codex, Claude Code, Kimi Code, OpenCode, and PiGraph-shaped traces.
metricClaims.empirical_gate: not yet cleared; still requires split metadata, integrity checks, retrospective labels, and baseline policy rows.
metricClaims.counterfactual_claims: blocked when OPE support is missing; no behavior or target propensities are invented.
